Bash(python3 - << 'EOF'
filepath = '/mnt/Main/Git Projects/unity-templates/Templates/Assets/LocalizationSystem/Runtime/LocalizationSystem.cs'

for enc in ['utf-8', 'utf-8-sig', 'cp1251', 'latin-1']:
    try:
        with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding=enc\) as f:
            lines = f.readlines\(\)
        encoding = enc
        break
    except Exception as e:
        continue

# 1-indexed line numbers with Debug.Log calls, process bottom-to-top
wrap_lines = sorted\([75, 107, 126, 200], reverse=True\)

for line_num in wrap_lines:
    idx = line_num - 1
    lines.insert\(idx + 1, '#endif\\n'\)
    lines.insert\(idx, '#if UNITY_EDITOR\\n'\)

with open\(filepath, 'w', encoding=encoding\) as f:
    f.writelines\(lines\)

print\(f'Done. Encoding: {encoding}'\)
EOF)

import os

files = [
    '/mnt/Main/Git Projects/unity-templates/Templates/Assets/LocalizationSystem/Runtime/LocalizationSystem.cs',
    '/mnt/Main/Git Projects/unity-templates/Templates/Assets/InventorySystem/Runtime/Chest.cs',
    '/mnt/Main/Git Projects/unity-templates/Templates/Assets/InventorySystem/Runtime/Item.cs',
]

for path in files:
    with open\(path, 'r', encoding='cp1251'\) as f:
        lines = f.readlines\(\)
    print\(f'\\n=== {os.path.basename\(path\)} ==='\)
    for i, line in enumerate\(lines, 1\):
        # Print lines with Cyrillic characters
        if any\('\\u0400' <= c <= '\\u04ff' for c in line\):
            print\(f'{i}: {line}', end=''\)
EOF)
